summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 adds scroll-triggered IntersectionObserver animations with prefers-reduced-motion support to OdishaGuide.tsx and related CSS keyframes. REQ-2 adds the full office address to Footer.tsx. REQ-3 adds 'Service Area: Odisha' to Footer.tsx with a Globe icon. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were detected.
